hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and orchestrates Travel Rule provider outputs into a consolidated platform that supports routing, exception handling, case management, and audit-ready evidence for VASP operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule messages depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Travel Rule workflows become slow and error-prone when message routing and exception handling rely on disconnected providers. This fragmentation creates gaps in review workflows, weakens audit evidence and increases operational burdens for compliance teams at VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates message routing, status tracking, exceptions and case creation from multiple Travel Rule providers into one unified workflow that preserves audit evidence and streamlines compliance team operations.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages through status tracking, exception handling and provider outputs into structured cases, evidence preservation and compliance review workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule tool. Provider-neutral control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple Travel Rule provider outputs into one operational layer, enabling structured workflows, case management, exception handling and audit-ready evidence without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a controlled, audit-ready environment that connects Travel Rule providers, preserves evidence and supports enterprise-grade deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule providers?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a provider-neutral layer that connects Travel Rule outputs into connected workflows, cases, decisions and reporting without replacing existing systems.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes incomplete or failed Travel Rule messages into structured case workflows, enabling exception review, escalation and audit evidence collection.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves message status, review history, decision logs and supporting evidence to maintain a clear audit trail for Travel Rule compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, consolidating their outputs into a single compliance operating layer that supports routing, cases and reporting.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements but does not replace Travel Rule tools; it connects their outputs into controlled workflows with audit-ready evidence and internal decision tracking.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule providers into one layer
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule routing, exception handling, case workflows and audit-ready evidence for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
